name: Swordfish Provencale
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup white wine or 1/4 cup lemon juice
recipeInstructions:
1. For bouquet garni, wrap 3 sprigs parsley, 1 bay leaf, 1 celery stalk sliced, and a pinch of thyme in cheesecloth. Tie shut.
2. In an ovenproof casserole, brown the swordfish in olive oil. Season with salt and pepper, then add onion, green pepper, tomatoes, mushrooms, and garlic. Saute for 10 minutes.
3. Add fish stock (or water) to cover the fish, then add wine or lemon juice. Place bouquet garni into the casserole.
4. Cover and bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes. Alternatively, simmer on top of the stove for 35-40 minutes.
5. When the fish flakes easily with a fork, remove from the casserole and keep warm.
6. Remove bouquet garni and reduce liquid by half in a saucepan. Blend flour and butter together to form a smooth paste, then whisk into the reduced liquid to thicken.
7. Correct seasoning with salt and pepper.
8. Pour the sauce over the swordfish and serve, garnished with diced pimentos and capers.
